frame_analyses.description: Setup visible with marked targets but no instruments engaged.
Needle is being loaded onto the instrument.
Suture is placed through a marked point.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good bite placement, close to target.

frame_analyses.description: Starting first throw of knot tying.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Technique seems appropriate for a surgeon's knot.

frame_analyses.description: Second throw of knot being tied.
Third throw of knot being tied, ensure correct hand alternation.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good hand alternation and suture management.

frame_analyses.description: Final knot appears secure, suture ends cut.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot looks tight with good approximation.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Tissue approximation appears complete and secure.

technique_summary: The trainee demonstrated good suture placement and secure knot tying, with effective hand alternation and tissue approximation.
improvement_suggestions: Increase efficiency in needle loading phase.
Minimize movements during knot tying for faster completion.
